subtext: No two events are the same, so no two sets are the same. Tell me the room and I'll bring the right sound for it.

items.name: Weddings & Traditional
items.desc: Engagements, traditional rites, receptions and after-parties — from the first dance to the last Amapiano groove.

items.name: Club Nights
items.desc: High-energy sets for lounges, rooftops and nightclubs across Lagos — Afrobeats, Amapiano and Hip-Hop mixed live.

items.name: Corporate & Private
items.desc: Launches, end-of-year parties, birthdays and private functions — sound and energy matched to the brief.

items.name: Festivals & Live Shows
items.desc: Stage sets, festival slots and live performances built for big crowds and bigger sound systems.
